issue_title: Fix Products dropdown transparency on Thousands of developers section
issue_body_preview:
<!--
Thank you for sending the PR! We appreciate you spending the time to work on these changes.

Help us understand your motivation by explaining why you decided to make this change.

You can learn more about contributing to appwrite here: https://github.com/appwrite/appwrite/blob/master/CONTR
test_description_zh: 在首页滚动到'Thousands of developers'部分，打开顶部导航栏中的 Products 下拉菜单，观察下拉菜单的背景样式。
expected_result_zh: Products 下拉菜单在'Thousands of developers'区域上方展开时，背景应为不透明（无透明效果），内容清晰可读，不会透出下方页面内容。
